event: necrosis of dorsum of both feet
necrosis of heels of both feet
diagnosis of concurrent multifocal necrotizing fasciitis
debridement of necrotic tissue from both feet
debridement of necrotic tissue from left middle finger
insertion of bilateral middle ear ventilation tubes

further debridement of limb wounds on day 8
